# Cambio de mercado ES, IT - HOME

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: 5qn-g3h-nxb.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/
3. Click to EUR currency option in the right menu in the header
4. Check if the popup appears with the different markets options
5. Select Italy country with EUR currency option
6. Check if the page reloads with the new market Italy with EUR currency in the currency option on the right menu in the header
